description_long: This is a pair of modern, boxy bungalows with flat roofs, set on rectangular plots featuring striped green and black lawns. Each bungalow has a clean, white facade with large, rectangular windows and simple black doors, giving a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The left bungalow is single-story, while the right one is two stories, both with open roof sections suggesting possible terraces or skylights. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped and others spaced apart, providing a dynamic visual rhythm. The buildings lack visible porches or decorative elements, emphasizing geometric lines and functional design. The overall look is stark and modern, suitable for urban neighborhoods prioritizing simplicity and efficiency.
description: A pair of modern, white, flat-roofed bungalows with large windows and striped lawns, one single-story and one two-story, featuring minimalist, geometric design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both bungalows side by side, highlighting the main entrances, large windows, and striped lawns.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the back walls with minimal window openings and the full extent of the striped lawns.
description_view_2: Opposite front view emphasizing the two-story structure on the left and the single-story on the right, with visible roof cutouts.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the rear facades and the open roof sections, with the striped lawns extending behind.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
